description: Letter from an unknown writer in Jerusalem to Yeshuʿa Rofe, Fustat (Ẓoʿan), possibly his place of residence given the specificity. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Catalogued as 17th century. The writer also greets the Qaraite community of Cairo (Miṣr ha-semukha Ẓoʿan). The purpose of the letter is to inform the addressee that Umm כאסכיה(?) died on the 24th of Nisan. The writer describes her funeral arrangements. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב מכותב לא ידוע בירושלים לישועה רופא, פוסטאט. בעברית וביהודית-ערבית. תיארוך: ממוין כמאה ה-17. מודיע שאום כאסכיה נפטרה בכ"ד ניסן ומתאר סידורי הלוויה.
